name: page-blueprint
description: Blueprint-first frontend planning and implementation plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and implement real product pages with blueprint-first workflow, shell rules, and builder handoff
interface.longDescription: Use Page Blueprint to classify target pages, decide page mode and shell mode, write implementation-ready page blueprints, and implement from approved blueprints without drifting into demo-dashboard UI or route/context mistakes.
defaultPrompt: Inspect my frontend repo, pick the best first target page, and draft an approved page blueprint.
Use page-blueprint for a visual-redesign blueprint, then hand it to page-builder.
Turn this target page into a workspace shell or centered page based on the workflow rules.
